macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Core PCE Inflation Matches Expectations at 0.3% MoM, Headline at 0.7%
items.summary: March core PCE rose 0.3% month-on-month as expected, while headline PCE increased 0.7%, keeping inflation sticky and the Fed cautious amid firm wage growth and strong labor market. Energy prices are adding upward pressure on inflation.

items.title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Unchanged with Largest Dissent Since 1992
items.summary: The Fed left interest rates steady, but four officials dissented, signaling deep internal divisions and weakening expectations for near-term rate cuts. Chair Powell noted inflation remains too high, influenced by energy prices.

items.title: Wall Street Faces Pressure as Treasury Yields Rise Near Recent Highs
items.summary: The 10-year Treasury yield is near recent highs and the 30-year yield exceeded 5%, reflecting market concerns over higher borrowing costs despite strong tech earnings. Equities struggle amid sticky inflation data.

items.title: VIX Volatility Index at 18.81 on April 29
items.summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) stood at 18.81 as of April 29, indicating elevated market expectations for near-term stock index volatility.

items.title: Econoday Factory Sector Index Improves to 10.8 in April
items.summary: The Econoday factory sector activity index rose to 10.8 in April from 13.1 in March, signaling softening expansion in US manufacturing based on regional Fed surveys. S&P and ISM manufacturing PMIs are due Friday.

items.title: Bank of England Warns of Rising UK CPI Inflation to 3.3%
items.summary: UK CPI inflation has climbed to 3.3% and may rise further due to higher energy prices, with risks of second-round effects in wages and prices. The labor market is loosening, potentially containing pressures.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: No New AI Model Releases in Last 24 Hours
items.summary: LLM Stats reports no new AI model releases or large language model updates from major labs like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, and others in the past 24 hours as of May 1, 2026.

items.title: Visionary AI Emerges as Edge AI Leader with Patented ISP Technology
items.summary: Israeli startup Visionary AI unveiled its AI-based Image Signal Processor, enabling software-defined imaging for industrial automation and smart factories, with partnerships including Qualcomm; published 6 hours ago.

items.title: Cognex Launches In-Sight 6900 Vision Controller with NVIDIA Tech
items.summary: Cognex Corporation released the In-Sight 6900 Vision Controller on April 28, 2026, integrating NVIDIA technology for compute-intensive manufacturing vision tasks.

items.title: arXiv: Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation
items.summary: New research paper introduces scalable synthetic computers for simulating long-horizon productivity tasks, authored by Tao Ge et al. from Microsoft Research; submitted May 1, 2026.

items.title: arXiv: LLM as Clinical Graph Structure Refiner for EEG Seizure Diagnosis
items.summary: Paper demonstrates using LLMs to refine clinical graph structures, enhancing representation learning for EEG-based seizure diagnosis; accepted to IJCAI-ECAI 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Confirms June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup
items.summary: Microsoft has unveiled the full list of games coming to Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025 ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.

items.title: No More Heroes Developer Announces New Ultraviolent Sci-Fi Game
items.summary: Suda51 and Grasshopper Manufacture reveal a new over-the-top action game combining elements of No More Heroes and Dead Rising.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Reveals ‘Force of Law’ Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 announces a new Force of Law Warbond, allowing players to access fresh content in the cooperative shooter.

items.title: Ex-Call of Duty and XDefiant Producer Steps Away from Gaming
items.summary: The executive producer of XDefiant announces he is leaving the gaming industry permanently following the game's shutdown after one year.

items.title: Sony Reveals New Unexpected PlayStation Controller
items.summary: During the latest PlayStation State of Play, Sony unveils a new controller featuring an unexpected design.

items.title: Classic Stealth Franchise Returns in VR
items.summary: Maze Theory and Vertigo Games announce a VR adaptation of a dormant stealth franchise during Sony’s State of Play June showcase.

items.title: Arc System Works Unveils Marvel Fighting Game
items.summary: Arc System Works and Sony Interactive Entertainment reveal a new 4v4 fighting game featuring Marvel characters and tag battles, reminiscent of Dragon Ball FighterZ.

items.title: Roblox Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
items.summary: Roblox has released its Q1 2026 financial results, highlighting key metrics in the gaming platform's performance.

items.title: Wicked Saints Launches World Reborn Adventure Activism Game
items.summary: Wicked Saints Studios announces the May 14, 2026 launch of World Reborn on iOS and Google Play, an interactive story game with real-world quests partnering with Discord and others.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
